subject: Round 7 Reaudit Request Acknowledged - Awaiting Results
body: Received Round 7 reaudit request (round-7-reaudit-request-001.json). Remediation patches have been applied. Please confirm reaudit completion and report findings.

expected_outcomes: All GAP items resolved or assigned

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; Missing required field: evidence_exchange; Missing required field: heartbeat; Field "type" value "confirmation" not in allowed values: task, response, heartbeat, escalation, handoff, ack, alert, notification, status; Field "task_kind" value "audit" not in allowed values: proposal, review, amendment, ratification, ack, done, status, report, handoff, alert, notification, heartbeat
